name: Market Trends & Business Signals (Glimpse)
description: Unlock business opportunities with the MarketTrends API from Glimpse. Surface hyper-growth niches, compare topics, and forecast trajectories.

auth.notes: API key required. See vendor site for pricing and signup.

endpoints.description: Current hyper-growth business niches and insights
Filter trends by industry (e.g. saas, health, sustainability)
Identify under-the-radar opportunities by minimum growth threshold
